title: uncasia lecheifolia
intro: Uncasia lecheifolia, also known as the Chinese water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Uncasia lecheifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Uncasia lecheifolia include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care.
